title: Spicy Korean Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on traditional lamb skewers, inspired by Korean BBQ.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine gochujang, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and 2 tablespoons of water. Blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the blended sauce, ginger, and green onions. Add the lamb cubes and toss to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Brush the skewers with robust marinade during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
